Description: Define your entire Umbraco structure — DataTypes, DocumentTypes, Media Types, Templates, Content, Media, Languages, Dictionary Items, Members, Member Types, Member Groups, and Users — in a single YAML file. The plugin reads the file on startup and creates or updates all declared entities automatically. Supports create, update ([UPDATE]) and delete ([REMOVE]) operations. After a successful import the file is renamed to *.done so it is not re-processed. Supports Umbraco 13 and 17.

AuthorDetails.Name: Carlos Casalicchio
AuthorDetails.Description: Developer at SplatDev. Building tools to make Umbraco development faster and more reproducible.

RelatedPackages.Description: Companion package — exports your existing Umbraco site structure to YAML. v2.x supports Umbraco 14-17, v1.x supports Umbraco 13.
